chattycherry5:

chattycherry5:

*gets handed a bright pink drink with hearts coming off of it*

“i heavily respect the commitment to the bit but like I’ll just do it. whatever this thing would do it’ll happen anyway.

ok maybe just a sip- ohhh fuck its strawberry”

*downs the entire drink*

“ok so when does this thing star- ohh-h god- okayyy~ hehehehhh….”
